title: LAPS Clear-Text Local Admin Password Read Attempt
description: Detects attempts to read the LAPS-managed local administrator password from the ms-Mcs-AdmPwd attribute. Tooling includes LAPSToolkit, Get-AdmPwdPassword, and pyLAPS. GOAD includes a LAPS reader path to recover local admin passwords.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*ms-Mcs-AdmPwd*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-AdmPwdPassword*' or 'Command Line' like '*LAPSToolkit*' or 'Command Line' like '*pyLAPS*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-LAPSADPassword*')))
falsepositives: LAPS administrative password retrieval by helpdesk
